mechanism: High Guidotti-Greenspan ratios (>1.0x) indicate rollover risk that triggers non-linear FX depreciation, which then activates the dollarization balance sheet channel: FX depreciation impairs net short FX positions on corporate balance sheets, triggering domestic credit tightening that compounds the import cost channel.
regime_dependence: Only relevant for economies with significant FX-denominated corporate or sovereign liabilities; India's regulatory limits demonstrate that macro-prudential policy can break this link
